milestone.title: Foundation-fold follow-ups
milestone.goal: Clear the 3 actionable deltas the v10/v12 fold routed out of the foundation: surface the unlocked→lock step in status, stop truncating multi-line deltas, and collapse the duplicated delta-grammar regex to one source.

delta-grammar-dedup.title: collapse duplicated _DELTA_RE to one canonical regex

status-lock-hint.title: status prints unlocked->lock hint when setup.locked is False

deltas-multiline-render.title: deltas/report renders full multi-line delta (no first-line truncation)
